name: Meter
description: Meter: a self-contained metric display with label, bar, and value with low/optimum/high thresholds

api.signature: new Meter(label: string, style: Partial<Style> = {}, opts: MeterOptions = {})

props.name: low
props.description: Value below this fraction renders the low color

props.name: high
props.description: Value at or above this fraction renders the high color
